chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women

text: 4370 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أَغْلَبُ اَلْأَعْدَاءِ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ زَوْجَةُ اَلسَّوْءِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4370 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"The most overpowering enemy of a believer is a bad wife."
